Name: Manteigaria (Chiado)
Tips: Standing counter. Watch the natas come out of the oven through the glass.

Name: Convento do Carmo
Tips: 1755 earthquake ruins, nave open to the sky. Closed Sundays.

Name: Elevador de Santa Justa
Tips: Cast-iron 1902 lift. Viewing deck over Rossio and the Carmo ruins.

Name: LX Factory
Tips: Industrial complex turned creative hub. Ler Devagar bookshop has the flying bicycle.

Name: Time Out Market Lisboa
Tips: Fallback lunch spot before the airport run.

Name: Museu do Chiado
Tips: Right in the neighbourhood you're already walking - zero detour.

Name: Museu da Guarda Nacional Republicana
Tips: Same square as Convento do Carmo - historic Carmo Barracks, site of the 1974 Carnation Revolution surrender. Verify opening hours.

Name: Museum of Illusions Lisboa
Cost Range: -20% with Lisboa Card (discount only, not free)
Tips: On the Rua Augusta route in Baixa/Chiado.
